Payment rule: Mixed mango orders stay pickup-only for now. You can pay for the full order at pickup. Virginia sales tax is added at checkout.
Food allergy and spice notice: Products may contain or be prepared with peanut/groundnut oil and other major allergens (including milk, egg, fish, shellfish, tree nuts, wheat, soy, and sesame). Ingredients, spice level, labels, and packaging may vary by supplier batch. Product images are for illustration only. If you have allergies, sensitivities, or medical dietary restrictions, contact us before ordering.
Shipping note: Orders above $75 get free shipping on Sweets, Pickles, and Podi only; mangoes are excluded.

By clicking “Place Order”, you confirm that you have read the food allergy & spice notice above and agree to our Terms & Conditions, Refund Policy and Privacy Policy.
